name: Empanadas De Fruta
recipeInstructions:
Fruit Filling:
Mixed dried fruit - 20 ounces
Raisins - 1/2 pound
Sugar - 3/4 cup
Cinnamon - 1/2 teaspoon
Cloves - 1/2 teaspoon
Nutmeg - 1/2 teaspoon
Pinon nuts (or other nuts) - 1 cup
Combine flour, salt, and sugar. Add shortening and mix well. Beat egg with water, then add to dry mixture. The dough should be soft but not sticky. Form small balls of dough. Roll out to a diameter of 5 inches and 1/8 inch thick. Place a heaping teaspoon of filling on half of the rolled-out dough. Fold the other half over and press edges together. Pinch edges between thumb and forefinger, giving the dough a half-turn. Fry in deep fat until golden brown. Drain.
Fruit Filling: Cook dried fruit and raisins in enough water to cover them. Heat until tender. Add sugar, spices, and nuts. Mix well. (A 21-ounce can of fruit pie filling can be substituted.)
